drills.name: Mark-to-mark needle path drill
drills.description: Practice 10 passes through both target marks on the Penrose drain before attempting any knot tying to build muscle memory for accurate needle placement.
drills.targets_weakness: No actual task performance was attempted or recorded.

drills.name: Knot-pusher sequencing drill
drills.description: Complete 10 three-throw extracorporeal sequences with deliberate knot pusher advancement to establish consistent suturing workflow.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, consistent task execution is essential for skill development. Focus on completing full suturing sequences rather than just setup to build proficiency and timing.
